subject: Resolved: intepreting Sunny Advocates hireling from the new Homeland Hirelings Pack

posts.body:
Choose a clearing suit.  In eachmatching clearing with any Advocate warriors, replace 1 enemy warrior with a warrior of your faction.
Then, place 1 Advocate warrior in a clearing without them at your faction pieces.  If you cannot, place 1 Advocate warrior in any clearing.

The sentence I struggle with is in italics.  I can't seem to understand what it means.  Typo?  I'm going crazy?  Really I just want to know what it means.  Anyone?

If any clearing has bits in your colour, and doesn't have an Advocate there
Add an Advocate warrior

Ah yes thank you.  With the wisdom of your interpretation, I would tweak your words slightly:
In any one clearing which has bits in your colour, and doesn't have an Advocate there
Add an Advocate warrior

Does this feel right to you?
